label: Boltzmann constant
source: SI Brochure 9th ed. (BIPM 2019), Table 1 — the seven defining constants; values exact by definition since the 2019 revision
notes: Quantity-kind assignment (entropy, J/K) is conventional; heat-capacity shares the dimension vector. The dimension vector, not the kind label, is what the constant contributes to dimension checking.
boundary: KERNEL: exact by fiat. Measured constants (G, m_e, α, ...) carry uncertainty and are WORLD-LAYER facts; they are deliberately excluded from this corpus.
